page.title: Point of sale
page.subtitle: Farm store and café register. Rings up bags, charges ITBMS, and keeps selling when the wifi drops.

noTerminals.title: No register set up yet
noTerminals.description: Register a till for the Janson Farm Store or Lagunas Café to start ringing up sales.

noSales.title: No sales yet today
noSales.description: Tap a bag on the register to ring up the first sale of the day.

register.heading: Register
register.noSkus: No bags in stock. Roast and stock a SKU first.

cart.heading: This sale
cart.empty: Tap a bag to start the sale.
cart.previewNote: The till confirms the final total when the sale is recorded.

register.offlineQueued: Saved offline. It will sync when the wifi returns.

errors.emptyCart: Add at least one bag to the sale.
errors.generic: That sale could not be recorded. Try again.
